A2_2::REFINED::engine_chirality_inequali.name: engine_chirality_inequality
A2_2::REFINED::engine_chirality_inequali.description: Left deductive loop != Right inductive loop.

A2_2::REFINED::Entropy-First Unified Fra.name: Entropy-First Unified Framework
A2_2::REFINED::Entropy-First Unified Fra.description: Synthesis: Spacetime=entropy (TOE axiom), matter/DM/DE as phase-states, with recursive scientific validation (Leviathan). The generative engine is positive entropy; preservation is negative entropy.

A2_2::REFINED::Perception as Predictive.name: Perception as Predictive Projection
A2_2::REFINED::Perception as Predictive.description: Synthesis: Holodeck model (project → sense → error-correct → hash) maps to active inference (minimize free energy) and to the physics model (retrocausal futures shape present perception).

A2_2::REFINED::Chiral Game Theory Operat.name: Chiral Game Theory Operators
A2_2::REFINED::Chiral Game Theory Operat.description: Synthesis: 8-state win/lose model with Te/Ti/Fe/Fi operators maps to S3+Hopf+Weyl topology. Operators are entropy transformers on the manifold. 16-state model via spinor double cover.

A2_2::REFINED::Mirror-Driven Self-Govern.name: Mirror-Driven Self-Governance Stack
A2_2::REFINED::Mirror-Driven Self-Govern.description: Synthesis: Three-tier mirror system (Individual/Organizational/Ecosystem) drives three-tier currency (SBC/CRC/ECC) under delegated proxy voting governance. Community layer for demographics/family.

A2_2::REFINED::Hash-Embedded Simulation.name: Hash-Embedded Simulation Memory
A2_2::REFINED::Hash-Embedded Simulation.description: Synthesis: Semantic hashes embedded in NetHack-like ASCII sim worlds as recall spaces. Comic vision reduces perception to playable approximations. Connects to Letta/MemGPT for stateful memory.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::graveyard_branch_.name: graveyard_branch_work
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::graveyard_branch_.description: The system retains a mass graveyard of failed/rejected terms and continues to work backward from them, building branches to root constraints as the attractor basin matures.

A2_2::REFINED::NONCLASSICAL_IMPERATIVE::.name: NONCLASSICAL_IMPERATIVE
A2_2::REFINED::NONCLASSICAL_IMPERATIVE::.description: All structure must be expressed in pure nonclassical terms. No classical semantics may survive underneath, even temporarily. This is the system's hardest constraint, referenced across every source document.

A2_2::REFINED::ELIMINATION_EPISTEMOLOGY:.name: ELIMINATION_EPISTEMOLOGY
A2_2::REFINED::ELIMINATION_EPISTEMOLOGY:.description: The system does not stamp 'Truth'. Constraints eliminate. Survivors are pressure-shaped by attractor basins. This governs ratchet behavior: terms survive by not being killed, not by being proven.

A2_2::REFINED::STRUCTURED_NONCLASSICAL_S.name: STRUCTURED_NONCLASSICAL_STATE
A2_2::REFINED::STRUCTURED_NONCLASSICAL_S.description: Runtime state carries region, phase, loop scale, boundaries, and invariants. Transform order is non-commutative. Equivalence is probe-relative, not primitive. This bridges the physics model to computation.

A2_2::REFINED::FINITUDE_BAN::7fe6a614321.name: FINITUDE_BAN
A2_2::REFINED::FINITUDE_BAN::7fe6a614321.description: Completed infinity is prohibited. Universes are bounded (Bekenstein-limited), numbers are finite, and all state operations terminate. This is load-bearing for the entire framework.

A2_2::REFINED::FOUR_LAYER_TRUST_SEPARATI.name: FOUR_LAYER_TRUST_SEPARATION
A2_2::REFINED::FOUR_LAYER_TRUST_SEPARATI.description: Strict A2→A1→A0→B layering. Context flows down; verified evidence flows up. Each layer has its own trust zone. No layer may write to a layer it does not own.

A2_2::REFINED::DETERMINISTIC_KERNEL_PIPE.name: DETERMINISTIC_KERNEL_PIPELINE
A2_2::REFINED::DETERMINISTIC_KERNEL_PIPE.description: The B Kernel processes artifacts through a fixed 7+3 stage pipeline (AUDIT_PROVENANCE through COMMIT) with exact rejection fences, accepts exactly 3 container types, maintains 6 replayable state objects, and seeds from F01_FINITUDE + N01_NONCOMMUTATION. This is the central admissibility mechanism.

A2_2::REFINED::A2_CONTROL_LAW::1b8c6c098.name: A2_CONTROL_LAW
A2_2::REFINED::A2_CONTROL_LAW::1b8c6c098.description: A2 is controlling upstream surface, not just extraction. 7 hard rules (no smoothing, no implicit ontology/time/commutation/teleology, source-bound, fail-closed). 14 active term conflicts tracked with working rules. User corrections outrank synthesis. Append-first mutation order. Deterministic tick sequence governs all state refresh.

A2_2::REFINED::DUAL_REPLAY_DETERMINISM_R.name: DUAL_REPLAY_DETERMINISM_REQUIREMENT
A2_2::REFINED::DUAL_REPLAY_DETERMINISM_R.description: All promotion and release candidates must pass dual deterministic replay: identical final state hash AND event-log hash across two full runs from same baseline. Applies to tuning (RQ-124), A1-to-B smoke (50-cycle RQ-127), and release (RQ-131). This is the system-wide determinism enforcement mechanism.

A2_2::REFINED::COUPLED_LADDER_RATCHET::5.name: COUPLED_LADDER_RATCHET
A2_2::REFINED::COUPLED_LADDER_RATCHET::5.description: One ratchet, two coupled ladders: structural (A2→A1→A0→B admission) and evidence (SIM T0→T6 tier progression with 5 stress families). Survivor significance requires positive_sim_ids + negative_sim_ids + graveyard_alt_ids. Static admission is insufficient.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::requirements_ledg.name: requirements_ledger_147_rqs
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::requirements_ledg.description: Master ledger of 147 MUST requirements (RQ-001..RQ-147). Organized by: root constraints (001-004), thread boundaries (010-014), B kernel (020-029), A0 compiler (030-039), A1 strategy (040-049 + 097-098), SIM evidence (050-059), graveyard (060-064), A2 ops (070-078 + 145-147), governance (080-088), ZIP/save/tapes (090-096), A1 wiggle (100-108), A2 brain (109-116), tuning (117-124), build sequence (125-132), run surface (133-138), conformance fixtures (139-144).

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::migration_handoff.name: migration_handoff_five_phases
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::migration_handoff.description: Deterministic migration from v2/legacy to v3: (1) Inventory — classify each doc as KEEP_REFERENCE/MERGED_INTO_V3/ARCHIVE_ONLY, (2) Mapping — map v2 normative statements to RQ-* IDs, (3) Freeze — freeze v2 as read-only snapshots, (4) Promote — v3 active after conformance gates, (5) Archive — legacy remains addressable by pointer map. Required: migration_inventory.json, migration_mapping.json, migration_unknowns.json, migration_promotion_report.json.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a_thread_bootpack.name: a_thread_bootpack_projection_rules
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a_thread_bootpack.description: Projects enforceable A-thread rules from BOOTPACK_THREAD_A_v2.60 into v3. Key rules: A-001 NO_SMOOTHING, A-002 NO_IMPLICIT_MEMORY (no "already established" without pasted artifact), A-003 NO_CHOICE_POLICY, A-006 ATOMIC_BOXES (one artifact per file), A-015 ARTIFACT_DRAFT_PROSE_BAN, A-017 SENTENCE_TERM_POLICY (underscore compounds are component-wise), A-018 FORMULA_SYMBOL_POLICY ("=" forbidden unless canonically allowed), A-019 GLYPH_POLICY. Provenance headers: A-110/A-116/A-117 SHA256 header injection.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::rosetta_two_phase.name: rosetta_two_phase_contract
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::rosetta_two_phase.description: A1 Rosetta is explicitly two-phase: (1) Cold-core extraction (kernel lane) — strip to math objects, express in kernel vocabulary, emit candidates+deps+alts+sim plans in A1_STRATEGY_v1. (2) Reattachment dictionaries (overlay lane) — after kernel admission+evidence, attach field-specific dictionaries to admitted kernel IDs. Multiple overlay dictionaries map different dialects onto same kernel term. Overlays never justify canon.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::mining_artifact_s.name: mining_artifact_shapes
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::mining_artifact_s.description: 4 artifact types: ROSETTA_MAP v1 (overlay mapping to kernel ids), ROSETTA_DICTIONARY_SET v1 (multiple dialect→kernel dictionaries with source_term/kernel_term/notes), FUEL_DIGEST v1 (structured extracts with kernel+rosetta suggestions), EXPORT_CANDIDATE_PACK v1 (sanitized B-safe draft candidates). A2 mining outputs are not canon. Core boundary: kernel lane = B-safe compilable, overlay lane = noncanon, must not leak into B-scanned fields.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::eight_phase_gate_.name: eight_phase_gate_pipeline
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::eight_phase_gate_.description: P0_SPEC_LOCK, P1_ARTIFACT_GRAMMAR, P2_B_CONFORMANCE, P3_A0_COMPILER, P4_A1_TO_B_SMOKE (min 50 cycles), P5_SIM_EVIDENCE_LOOP (evidence ingest + graveyard integrity), P6_LONG_RUN_DISCIPLINE (shard/file/byte limits), P7_RELEASE_CANDIDATE (dual replay). Each phase has dedicated producer tool and writes deterministic JSON report.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::mining_rosetta_ar.name: mining_rosetta_artifact_packs_recovery
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::mining_rosetta_ar.description: 4 required artifact packs: FUEL_DIGEST v1 (structured mined extracts with kernel_candidate_suggestions + overlay_mapping_suggestions), ROSETTA_MAP v1 (source_term -> kernel_anchor with anchor_type TERM/SPEC_ID, status BOUND/UNKNOWN), OVERLAY_SAVE_DOC v1 (rebootable noncanon overlay package), EXPORT_CANDIDATE_PACK v1 (sanitized kernel-lane draft candidates). 5 hard rules: NO_CANON_WRITES, KERNEL_ANCHOR_REQUIRED, NO_KERNEL_OVERLAY_CONFUSION, DETERMINISTIC_ORDER, SOURCE_POINTER_REQUIRED.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_historical_bra.name: a1_historical_branch_wiggle_model
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a1_historical_bra.description: Historical draft A1 branch model: states OPEN/ACTIVE/PARKED/RETIRED/RESURRECTABLE. Branch object: branch_id, parent_branch_id, seed_hash, prompt_hash, operator_history[], feedback_refs[], novelty_score, viability_score, combined_rank_key. Historical operator quota table (8 operators with proportional quotas). Novelty floor: reject if < 0.15 unless addressing unseen failure mode. Stall detection triggers deterministic quota rebalancing. Graveyard emphasis: at least one graveyard-seeking alternative per primary cluster.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::pro_thread_boot_l.name: pro_thread_boot_levels
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::pro_thread_boot_l.description: 4 Pro boot levels: LEVEL_1_NARROW_SOURCE (1 source family, ZIP-only context, source acquisition), LEVEL_2_METHOD_COMPARE (bounded comparison, selected overlays, method scouting), LEVEL_3_LANE_REFINERY (multi-source lane, bounded A2 framing, lane-level fuel), LEVEL_4_FULL_A2_REASONING_SPACE (exploratory, large A2 slice, strongest audit burden). 5 hard rules: PRO_IS_NOT_AUTHORITY, BOOT_CLASS_MUST_BE_EXPLICIT, CONTEXT_DEPTH_MUST_MATCH_ROLE, GENERATION_AND_AUDIT_SPLIT (Pro=generation, Thinking/Heavy=audit), ZIP_FIRST. Choose lowest boot level that works.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_save_report_su.name: a0_save_report_surface_family
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::a0_save_report_su.description: 6 required deterministic A0 report surfaces: PROJECT_SAVE_DOC v1 (semantic save document), AUDIT_PROJECT_SAVE_DOC_REPORT v1 (pass/fail audit), EXPORT_BLOCK_LINT_REPORT v1 (preflight scan), TAPE_SUMMARY_REPORT v1 (tape deterministic summary), TERM_CHAIN_REPORT v1 (compound term decomposition), INSTRUMENTATION_REPORT v1 (process health). 4 build laws: DETERMINISTIC_ORDER, SOURCE_POINTER_REQUIRED, NO_INFERENCE_BEYOND_SURFACE, ONE_REPORT_ONE_CONTAINER.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::system_bundle_and.name: system_bundle_and_reboot_playbook
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::system_bundle_and.description: Current bundle: B kernel authority, A0 deterministic tooling/save/report, A2 controller/workers, A1 proposal workers, SIM process, optional M-style mining/Rosetta. Legacy thread mapping: THREAD_B->B kernel, THREAD_S->A0 save/report, THREAD_SIM->SIM runtime, THREAD_M->A2 mining/Rosetta, THREAD_A->controller discipline. 7 hard rules including NO_LITERAL_THREAD_TOPOLOGY_RESTORE, A2_A1_REMAIN_PRIMARY. Current boot order: verify B restore -> A0 tools -> A2_CONTROLLER -> optional A2_WORKERs -> A1_WORKER only from queue -> SIM campaigns. 3 restore paths: from PROJECT_SAVE_DOC, from FULL+, from FULL++.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::control_plane_bun.name: control_plane_bundle_architecture
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::control_plane_bun.description: Control-plane spec suite README + architecture overview + layer boundaries + mutation path rules. Frozen spec surface as single source of truth for: ZIP transport law, strategy/evidence schemas, repair discipline, promotion binding, A2 perception. Layers: A2 (high-entropy meta) -> A1 (nondeterministic proposer) -> A0 (deterministic compiler/router) -> B (constraint kernel, EXPORT_BLOCK only) -> SIM (deterministic validator, SIM_EVIDENCE only). Directional flow: FORWARD (proposals) A2->A1->A0->B, BACKWARD (feedback/save) B/SIM->A0->A1->A2. Fail-closed execution posture.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::promotion_binding.name: promotion_binding_and_evidence_digests
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::promotion_binding.description: PROMOTION_BINDING: 4 deterministic gates for readiness (G1: negative SIM coverage min NEG_FAILS + no kill signals, G2: stress-family coverage, G3: graveyard pressure threshold T_graveyard, G4: operator diversity >=2 distinct operator_ids). States: NOT_READY/READY_FOR_TIGHTEN/READY_FOR_CANON. SIM_EVIDENCE_v1: container for simulation evidence. STATE_TRANSITION_DIGEST: deterministic replay digest. STRUCTURAL_DIGEST: A0-recomputable normalized structure hash. CONSTRAINT_TIGHTENING_PROPOSAL: proposal to tighten constraint surface.

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::validator_contrac.name: validator_contracts_and_stress_tests
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::validator_contrac.description: 6 validator contracts: A0_DETERMINISM_TEST (validates A0-DET-01: identical inputs -> identical outputs), FULL_CYCLE_SIMULATION (end-to-end cycle test plan), SEMANTIC_RATCHET_STRESS_TEST_PLAN (stress testing the ratchet admission), AUTOMATED_STRESS_HARNESS_BLUEPRINT (harness for automated testing), DETERMINISTIC_REPLAY_RUNNER_OUTLINE (replay integrity validation), ZIP_VALIDATION_MATRIX (comprehensive ZIP validation truth table).

A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::public_facing_sys.name: public_facing_system_docs
A2_3::SOURCE_MAP_PASS::public_facing_sys.description: 3 public-facing docs: SYSTEM_INTENT (constraint engine starting from F01_FINITUDE + N01_NONCOMMUTATION, admission/rejection/park deterministically, sims as evidence, non-negotiables include negative sims + graveyard), LAYERED_ARCHITECTURE_AND_ENTROPY_BOUNDARY (entropy boundary between high-entropy proposals and deterministic kernel), FLOWMIND_A3_HOSTING_INTERFACE_CONTRACT (external hosting interface contract). Together define the public-facing explanation of the system.
